heroBanner.description: Large hero banner introducing Hansegrün wellness and health shot brand with natural, wellness-focused aesthetic. Woman in beige pullover drinking a shot with closed eyes, bright living room background. Green tones and natural imagery positioning brand as health-conscious supplement provider.

heroBanner.description: Brand story hero with company mission and wellness values. Natural, plant-based brand positioning with founder story.

pages.designNote: Brand storytelling page (8 images) with company history, mission, values, product sourcing story, certifications. Hero + multiple narrative/imagery sections reinforcing brand identity as natural health/wellness provider.

heroBanner.description: Product finder/quiz tool with minimal branding

pages.designNote: Interactive product recommendation tool (quiz/filter system). Minimal editorial - focus on functional UI helping customers find right health/wellness products. Single banner + interactive interface.

colorScheme.rationale: Natural, wellness-focused aesthetic conveys health, organic positioning, and trustworthiness in health/supplement category

typography.primary: Clean sans-serif + italic for brand personality
typography.characteristics: Accessible, wellness-oriented, health-conscious. Emphasis on benefits and wellness outcomes. Italic typography for headlines creates brand distinctiveness.

photography.subjects: Natural ingredients (ginger, citrus, greens), fresh fruit and vegetables, people drinking shots in natural settings, happy healthy people, organic product presentation

layoutPatterns.homepage: Large hero (3000x1500) + divider (872x91) + wide category tiles (2x872x436) + mixed grid (wide banners 872x290, narrow tiles 436x218, small squares 218x218, divider 872x92)
layoutPatterns.categoryPages: Consistent hero (1872x400) + supporting banners (1-2) + product grid
layoutPatterns.benefitPages: Template-driven: hero (1872x400) + 2 supporting product highlight banners + product grid. Consistent across all 9 benefit sub-pages.
layoutPatterns.contentRichPages: Multiple editorial sections (8-13) interleaved with product grids for hub pages and brand pages

hierarchyStructure.navigationDepth: 2 levels - main categories + health benefit sub-categories
hierarchyStructure.benefitsStructure: 9 health benefit sub-pages under Benefits hub, creating deep specialization around wellness outcomes
hierarchyStructure.distribution: Concentrated editorial on Startseite (15 images) and Benefits hub (13 images), with template-consistent benefit pages (3 images each)
hierarchyStructure.strategy: Benefit-driven navigation allows Hansegrün to organize product discovery around health outcomes rather than product types

distribution.rationale: Homepage hero + benefits navigation structure - visual gateway with diverse layout patterns demonstrating brand aesthetic and navigation options
Benefits hub page - content-richest non-homepage page serving as visual index to all health benefits. Acts as navigation center linking to 9 benefit sub-pages.
Brand storytelling hub - company mission, wellness values, ingredient sourcing, founder story, and brand credibility in health/supplement space

distribution.page: Benefit sub-pages (9 total: Immunsystem, Energie & Sport, Darmfunktion, Anti-Müdigkeit, Zahnfunktion, Zellschutz, Eisenaufnahme, Hautfunktion, Stoffwechsel, Knochenfunktion)
distribution.videos: 0-1 each (4 total: Zahnfunktion, Zellschutz, Eisenaufnahme, Hautfunktion)
distribution.rationale: Template consistency - each benefit page receives identical structure with 3 editorial images. Videos on 4 pages highlight specific health benefits or product demonstrations.
Pure product grid - functional catalog view
Interactive tool - minimal editorial, focus on functional UI for product recommendation/discovery quiz

brandIdentity.visualLanguage: Light, natural aesthetic with dark green and warm cream/beige tones. Clean typography with italic headlines for brand personality. Natural ingredient imagery and lifestyle photography create approachable, trustworthy health brand positioning. Focus on wellness outcomes (immune system, energy, digestive health, etc.) rather than product features. Fresh ingredients and modern wellness lifestyle positioning.
brandIdentity.targetAudience: Health-conscious consumers, wellness seekers, natural supplement users, individuals focused on preventive health and specific health benefits. Bio/organic-conscious demographic.
brandIdentity.navigationPhilosophy: Benefit-driven navigation centered on health outcomes. Rather than organizing by product type, Hansegrün structures discovery around specific health benefits: Immunsystem, Energie & Sport, Darmfunktion, Anti-Müdigkeit, Zahnfunktion, Zellschutz, Eisenaufnahme, Hautfunktion, Stoffwechsel, Knochenfunktion. Benefits hub serves as visual index with consistent sub-page templates, allowing consumers to find products aligned with their specific health goals. Complements with traditional product category navigation (Shots, Spar-Sets) and interactive tools (Produktfinder quiz).

notableObservations.templateDriven: Extremely consistent template across 9 benefit sub-pages - each has exactly 3 editorial images and 0-1 video. This creates predictable user experience while allowing for benefit-specific messaging.
notableObservations.videoDistribution: 6 videos total, distributed on only 2 pages: Neuheiten (1 video) and 4 benefit pages (Zahnfunktion, Zellschutz, Eisenaufnahme, Hautfunktion). Videos likely demonstrate specific health benefits or product usage.
notableObservations.benefitsFocus: Deep navigation around health benefits (9 sub-pages) indicates core positioning. This is unusual compared to typical supplement stores and demonstrates sophisticated understanding of customer health goals.
notableObservations.contentConcentration: 67% of editorial images concentrated on just 3 pages: Startseite (15), Benefits hub (13), Über Uns (8). Remaining 16 pages contain only 41 images, showing strategic editorial concentration on key navigation hubs and brand storytelling.
notableObservations.imageryStrategy: Homepage features diverse image sizes (3000x1500 hero, 872x290 wide banners, 436x218 half-tiles, 218x218 small squares, 872x91-92 dividers) demonstrating flexible layout system. Benefit pages use consistent sizing for predictable structure.
notableObservations.minimalistVideo: Only 6 videos across 19 pages suggests image-forward strategy with selective video use for specific health benefits or product demonstrations.
notableObservations.bundleFocus: Dedicated Spar-Sets page indicates important sales channel for product bundles and value packages.
notableObservations.brandAuthenticity: Founder story and Über Uns page prominence reinforces startup authenticity and transparent brand positioning. Focus on natural/bio positioning with founder-driven narrative.
